_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and operating enterprise data and AI governance councils, including role definition, decision rights, escalation paths, and policy enforcement mechanisms.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AG domain. AG-S-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-008 (LS, cosine: 0.600), RC-T-002 (RC, cosine: 0.570).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.6/10 (raw 0.660). Shared vocabulary: [enterprise, skill]. DCWF-only terms [agency, developing, level, policies] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, councils, data, decision, definition, designing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.896, R=0.863). P exceeds R by 0.032 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Skill in developing enterprise-level/Agency-level policies." and "Skill in designing and operating enterprise data and AI governance councils, inc" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.672 ≈ STS 0.660 (gap 0.012). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [enterprise, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [enterprise, skill]. DCWF-only: [agency, developing, level, policies]. WIDAI-only: [ai, councils, data, decision, definition, designing].
